title: Eka Care: AI-Native Health OS | EMR, EHR & ABDM Platform
heading: The AI-Native Ambient
description: India's intelligent Health OS for modern healthcare. AI-driven EMR for doctors, hospital management tools, ABHA integration, and developer APIs — one platform powering the full care ecosystem.

Complete Patient Context It understands longitudinal patient records — connecting past diagnoses, treatments and investigations to surface meaningful clinical insights at the right time. Actionable Alerts From drug interactions to investigation suggestions, every prompt is contextual and workflow-aware, reducing risk without adding alert fatigue. Ambient Intelligence in Workflow Integrated with AI Scribe and prescription workflows, insights appear naturally during documentation — without disrupting patient interaction. Powered by Health Data Powered by interoperable medical records and population intelligence, it enables consistent, high-quality clinical care. INSTITUTIONAL PARTNER Anvik Ortho & General Clinic, Hyderabad MEDASSIST SESSIONS 3000+ Eka Care is an excellent app for creating e-prescriptions and sending WhatsApp messages to patients. It is especially useful for maintaining medical records of patients with chronic diseases and recurrent conditions. The Eka Care team personally guided the staff and receptionist through the platform seamlessly. Dr. K. Sudheer Kumar Reddy Consultant Orthopaedic Surgeon INSTITUTIONAL PARTNER Aditya Hospital & Maternity Home, Chattisgarh MEDASSIST SESSIONS 3000+ Eka Care has made practice significantly easier with fully customized software tailored to individual needs. The patient record maintenance and next-visit message feature has been highly appreciated by both the doctor and patients. The Eka Care team has been very helpful, supportive, and quick to resolve all queries. Dr. H. B. Kalikoty Preventive Cardiologist & Diabetologist INSTITUTIONAL PARTNER Kingsway Hospitals, Nagpur MEDASSIST SESSIONS 3000+ After 30 years of practice, Dr. Bora found Eka Care to be his ideal comprehensive OPD tool that saves time and efficiently manages patient records. The entire Eka Care team has been excellent and prompt in delivering support. He strongly recommends Eka Care to other doctors. Dr. Harshwardhan Bora Sr. Consultant Internal Medicine INSTITUTIONAL PARTNER ToothSense Multi Speciality Dental Clinic, Bangalore MEDASSIST SESSIONS 3000+ Eka Care offers a smooth, user-friendly interface with a negligible learning curve and seamless WhatsApp integration. The GMB platform provides clear analysis of clinic reach and performance. The Eka Care team has always been very helpful in resolving issues and answering queries promptly. Dr. Ankit Varun BDS, MDS INSTITUTIONAL PARTNER Gandhi Hospital, Nagpur MEDASSIST SESSIONS 3000+ Eka Care's AI-based tool has been user-friendly and time-saving, with smart suggestions for symptoms, diagnoses, and medicines. The mobile app and broadcast messaging feature have been particularly impressive. The Eka Care team has been consistently available and prompt in providing support whenever required. Dr. Pramod D. Gandhi Endocrinologist & Diabetologist INSTITUTIONAL PARTNER Healing Hands Clinic, Ghaziabad MEDASSIST SESSIONS 3000+ Eka Care has helped organise and access patient medical records with ease, providing a holistic view of medical history and past treatments. Prescriptions, follow-ups, and medicine reminders can all be sent over WhatsApp seamlessly. The entire Eka Care team has been very helpful in resolving issues and even provided full on-site support.
